nodes.label: Growth Mindset
nodes.notes: Core operating philosophy. Constant improvement across all domains — physical, mental, financial, social. Not aspirational, actually lived.

nodes.label: Discipline & Consistency
nodes.notes: Consistency in good habits over motivation. Shows up in gym, coding, building projects.

nodes.label: Aesthetics Matter
nodes.notes: Believes aesthetics are important in all areas — physical appearance, design, environments. Has a good eye, developing the technical ability to match.

nodes.label: Health is Foundational
nodes.notes: Mental and physical health are non-negotiable. Views them as essential to living a full life, not optional extras.

nodes.label: Financial Independence
nodes.notes: Short term: enough cash flow to support a leisure lifestyle as a single young adult — eat well, travel occasionally, upgrade wardrobe. Not extravagant, just free. Currently dependent on parents which he dislikes.

nodes.label: Build & Own Businesses
nodes.notes: Long term goal: start own businesses, work for himself, automate income streams. Wants to be the one holding the equity.

nodes.label: Aggressive Investing
nodes.notes: Wants to invest aggressively once capital exists. Previously had investments, sold last summer for rent/school/independence.

nodes.label: Become a Weapon in the Workforce
nodes.notes: Learning as many skills as possible, especially software creation and AI fluency. Urgent — internship search, semester ends May 2026.

nodes.label: Marriage & Family
nodes.notes: Long term: get married, wealthy enough to support a family, buy a house. Currently focused on dating and being more social.

nodes.label: Travel the World
nodes.notes: Wants to travel the world for a period. Currently constrained by finances.

nodes.label: Current Financial State
nodes.notes: ~$1k in bank. No income. Parents cover rent, food, essentials. Tuition covered by FAFSA. Other expenses self-funded. Dad is a dentist (affluent). Two siblings recently married = parents have more to give. Sold investments last summer for rent/school. Dislikes dependence on parents.

nodes.label: Gym & Fitness
nodes.notes: Major priority. Goal: best physical and aesthetic shape of his life. Consistent habit.

nodes.label: Skiing
nodes.notes: Winter sport of choice. Lives in Utah — good access.

nodes.label: Outdoors & Adventure
nodes.notes: Hiking, camping, action/adrenaline sports. Anything that gets him outside and moving. Skydiving is on the list when funds allow.

nodes.label: Sports & Athletics
nodes.notes: Basketball, pickleball, running — just about any sport or physical activity. Social and competitive.

nodes.label: Fashion & Style
nodes.notes: Wants to upgrade wardrobe. Currently limited by finances. Tied to aesthetics belief.

nodes.label: Travel
nodes.notes: Wants to travel — currently constrained by college student finances.

nodes.label: Dad (Richards)
nodes.notes: Dentist. Affluent. Currently supporting Trenton financially (rent, food, essentials). Two siblings got married so more support available now.

nodes.label: Chad Richards
nodes.notes: Sibling. Recently married.

nodes.notes: Sibling. Recently married.

nodes.notes: Sibling.
